title: AUNZ SMP
description: The base client pack for the AUNZ Minecraft server.
body:
The base client pack for the _AUNZ Minecraft server_, including all content mods required to join along with some optimization and quality of life mods.

(This modpack is designed to be used on the Australia/New Zealand Modded Minecraft Server and thus included mods/future updates may be specific to the server and not apply to all users of the pack)

**Significant mods:**
- Create (+ addons including a currency system)
- Cobblemon (+ addons)
- Terralith
- Dungeon Now Loading
- Immersive Aircraft
- Simple Voice Chat and VR Support
- Performance and Quality of Life mods
